title: The Neutral Trap
description: Two theories have been published. Their aspects are fully known from your notes — check each claim. Mixing the two ingredients won't help here; use what the clues tell you directly.

hints.text: Your clues tell you every aspect of ing3 and ing7. For each publication, compare the true aspect signs against those of the claimed alchemical — the colour where signs differ is your apprentice debunk target.

ing3 is truly npN (R-, G+, B-). The publication claims nPp (R-, G+, B+). R and G match — only B contradicts (true B- vs claimed B+). ing7 is truly pnP (R+, G-, B+). The publication claims Nnp (R-, G-, B+). G and B match — only R contradicts (true R+ vs claimed R-).

Two-step plan: apprentice-debunk ing3 on B- (true B- contradicts the claimed B+). Then apprentice-debunk ing7 on R+ (true R+ contradicts the claimed R-). Note: ing3 (npN) and ing7 (pnP) are direct opposites — they always mix to neutral. A master debunk on this pair would reveal neutral, creating a conflict: both publications are contradicted simultaneously, but neither can be removed. Apprentice debunks are your only path to actually removing these.
